problem: Customer refund promised but not yet received
resolution: Located the refund stuck in a pending state, manually re-triggered it, and shared the transaction reference. Refunds now post within 3-5 business days.

problem: Customer charged twice for the same order
resolution: Confirmed the duplicate charge, reversed it within 3-5 business days, and added a deduplication check on the payment retry path.

problem: Card declined despite being valid elsewhere
resolution: Card was blocked by the fraud filter; whitelisted it and advised matching the billing address. Payment succeeded on retry.

problem: Order stuck in transit with no tracking updates
resolution: Opened a carrier trace, found the parcel delayed at a sorting hub, and shipped a replacement with expedited delivery.

problem: Package marked delivered but never received
resolution: Filed a lost-in-transit claim with the carrier and dispatched a replacement after verifying the delivery address.

problem: Wrong item received in the package
resolution: Arranged a free return and shipped the correct item the same day. Flagged the SKU mix-up to the warehouse for QA.

problem: Customer wants to track their order
resolution: Shared the live tracking link and carrier reference, and enabled shipping notifications on the account.

problem: Cancel an order before it ships
resolution: Cancelled the order before dispatch and confirmed that no charge would be taken.

problem: Customer needs an invoice for a purchase
resolution: Emailed the itemized invoice as a PDF and showed where to download past invoices in the account portal.

problem: Locked out and password reset not working
resolution: Verified identity, cleared the lockout, and sent a secure password-reset link. Recommended enabling two-factor authentication.

problem: Update the email address on an account
resolution: Updated the account email after identity verification and sent a confirmation to both the old and new addresses.

problem: Change the shipping address on an order
resolution: Updated the shipping address before dispatch and confirmed the revised delivery estimate.

problem: Customer wants to cancel or pause a subscription
resolution: Processed the cancellation immediately and confirmed no further charges. Offered a one-month pause as an alternative.

problem: Refund requested for a damaged item
resolution: Approved a refund under warranty and emailed a prepaid return label for the damaged item.

problem: Customer wants to reach a human agent
resolution: Connected the customer to a senior agent by phone and logged a callback as a backup.
Apologized, escalated to the team lead, followed up with a resolution, and applied a goodwill credit to the account.
